overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountain valley during golden hour. Snow-capped peaks and a distant lake are visible through dramatic clouds while birds soar overhead, creating a contemplative atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic vista

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on cliff edge, gazing at the distant mountain vista with slight idle movements

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow visible against the golden sky, dominating the horizon
calm body of water visible in the valley below reflecting the warm light
steep rocky outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the drop
small wooden stake or marker post on the left side of the frame
dense tree cover filling the valley below the cliff, appearing as dark green masses

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain valley bathed in golden hour light. A snow-capped mountain dominates the distant horizon while a lake glimmers in the valley below, surrounded by dense forest canopy. The scene remains static and contemplative throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, contemplative vista of a rugged cliffside overlooking a vast mountain valley during the golden hour. It begins with a focused view of a hooded character standing at the rocky edge, gazing out over a landscape bathed in warm, amber light. As the eye wanders across the horizon, the scene expands to reveal a glimmering lake nestled within a dense forest canopy in the valley below. The perspective finally settles on a towering, snow-capped mountain that dominates the distant skyline under a dramatic sky.
